ocr.title: Text Recognition (OCR)
ocr.description: Recognize text from images with multi-language and layout support.

clip.title: Image Embedding (CLIP)
clip.description: Generate vector embeddings for image-to-image and text-to-image search.

face.title: Face Recognition
face.description: Detect and cluster faces in photos.

sidecar.title: Python Extension Models
sidecar.description: Advanced models hosted by the Python sidecar (VLM / multimodal).

ocr.rapid-ocr-rust.name: RapidOCR
ocr.rapid-ocr-rust.description: PP-OCRv5 Server detection + CTC recognition, Contours rotated-text detection, native ONNX Runtime inference.

ocr.pp-ocrv5-mobile.name: PP-OCRv5 Mobile
ocr.pp-ocrv5-mobile.description: PP-OCRv5 Mobile lightweight model, axis-aligned detection, suited for fast bulk scanning.

clip.default.name: CLIP ViT-B/32
clip.default.description: General multimodal embedding model for image search and cross-lingual text queries.

face.default.name: Face Detection + Embedding
face.default.description: ONNX-based face detector with 512-dim embedding extractor.

stt.whisper-base.name: Whisper Base
stt.whisper-base.description: OpenAI Whisper base model, ~74 MB, suited for offline transcription.

stt.whisper-small.name: Whisper Small
stt.whisper-small.description: OpenAI Whisper small model, ~244 MB, higher accuracy.

stt.streaming.name: Streaming Speech Recognition
stt.streaming.description: Low-latency online speech recognition for real-time voice input.

sidecar.got-ocr-2.name: GOT-OCR 2.0
sidecar.got-ocr-2.description: Vision-language model (VLM), end-to-end OCR for complex layouts. Requires GPU.
